en.extract:
The golden cuckooshrike (Campochaera sloetii) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae. It is monotypic within the genus Campochaera. It is found in New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.

External links
Image at ADW Archived 2008-12-02 at the Wayback Machine

zh.extract:
橙鹃鵙（学名：Campochaera sloetii）是山椒鸟科下的一种，为橙鹃鵙属（学名：Campochaera）的单型种。该物种分布于印度尼西亚和巴布亚新几内亚，其自然栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润低地森林。


参考文献
BirdLife International. Campochaera sloetii. The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species 2009.   [2010-10-27] （英语）.
